name: Social pilot
highlight_text: Social Pilot is best for a high range of capabilities and features
description:
Let Social Pilot Work for You. 

Social Pilot is a rising star in the social media management tools space. Its growing customer base includes major players like Amazon, Samsung, and Vodafone. Social Pilot offers a vast range of functions at a moderate price. The features include those for content creation and post scheduling on Facebook and other socials. You can access the platform via mobile or the web.
‍

Source: SocialPilot 

Key Features of Social Pilot.   

  • Social management: Social Pilot offers a wide range of social management features, such as campaign planning and optimization, high-rate social publishing, and the capacity to manage over nine social networks.
  • Social analytics and reports: Analyze social media with less effort thanks to easy-to-digest analytics and reports.  
  • Content and collaboration: Social Pilot supports content creation with content idea generation, workflows and file access settings for collaboration, etc.     
  • Planning: The social media calendar provides visibility into your post schedule. 

Unique Benefits of Using Social Pilot. 

Social Pilot supports every step of the post management process, from ideation to content planning, scheduling, and publishing. Good analytics and statistics provides further insights on post performance, and easy-to-digest reports enhance collaboration. 

That’s not all there is to the benefits of Social Pilot. Here’s more:

  • Social Pilot offers an impressive set of features at a relatively inexpensive price, giving users great value for every dollar spent.
  • Social Pilot offers all the standard features of most post-scheduling platforms, including team collaboration tools, post planning and creation tools, and bulk uploads.
  • Workflows facilitate internal and external collaborations.
  • Access via the web, mobile, and browser extension ensures 24/7 access to the platform.  

Choose the Best Pricing Option for Your Business. 

Four plans are available for Social Pilot users, starting at USD 25.5 / month  

Consider the Following Pros of Social Pilot. 

  • Manage posts on over 9 social media platforms.   
  • Great value for money.  
  • Bulk post scheduling.
  • 24/7 access to social media management tools via web and mobile. 

Beware of the Following Cons of Social Pilot. 

  • Minor glitches often plague the platform.
  • Could make do with extra features like photo editing tools for post images.

‍
